# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: helmchartdemoapp_configmap
data:
  imagePullPolicy: "Always"
---  
apiVersion: batch/v1beta1
kind: CronJob
metadata:
  name: update-containerimage
spec:
  schedule: "*/5 * * * *" # Change this to your requirement (e.g., every minute)   
  jobTemplate:    
   spec:        
       template:     
        spec:           
          containers:          
          - name: helmchartdemoapp            
              imagePullPolicy: "Always"                  # Change here too
